name: Ramen Cabbage Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop cabbage into small pieces.
2. Add sliced green onion to the cabbage.
3. Toast sesame seeds and almonds on a cookie sheet in an oven until golden brown.
4. Crush Ramen noodles (Original Flavor) in the package.
5. Open the broth package separately.
6. Just before serving, add crushed (uncooked) noodles, toasted sesame seeds, and sliced almonds to the cabbage and green onions.
7. Prepare the dressing by mixing water, oil, and vinegar according to the salad dressing bottle instructions.
8. Add 1 package of Ramen seasoning and 1 tablespoon sugar to the dressing; shake well.
9. Toss all ingredients together just before serving.
This recipe is wonderful and was enjoyed by everyone at a Christmas dinner, including those who typically dislike cabbage or slaw.
